long_description:
Affected support: On-Site Personnel Coverage / DCOPS Supported Services
Location: SYD04
short_description: Onsite Resource Availability - Team Coverage Unavailable (Morning) - SYD04
current_status_next_steps:
Solo SBT took a day off due to personal emergency. 
Site Manager on site providing coverage.
Site was unattended between 7am - 9am and will be unamanned again between 4pm - 7pm
